title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Digital Mobile Spectrum Group Ltd
body: "Application number 5206  Applicant Digital Mobile Spectrum Ltd objected to the name used by Digital Mobile Spectrum Group Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Digital Mobile Spectrum Group Ltd is changed to 15812407, Ltd. "
